name: FLOWSERVE CORP
summary: Flowserve Corporation is a world-leading manufacturer and aftermarket service provider of comprehensive flow control systems, producing precision-engineered pumps, valves, seals, and automation equipment. The company serves global infrastructure industries including energy, chemical, power generation, and general industries (water management, pharmaceuticals). It also offers aftermarket services such as installation, advanced diagnostics, and turnkey maintenance through a global network of Quick Response Centers (QRCs).
